questions.question: What is the main difference between Procedural and OOP?
What is a class in OOP?
keyPoints: A blueprint or template for creating objects

questions.question: What is inheritance in OOP?
keyPoints: The process of creating a new class based on an existing class

questions.question: What is polymorphism in OOP?
keyPoints: The ability of an object to take on multiple forms

questions.question: What is encapsulation in OOP?
keyPoints: The practice of hiding an object's internal details and exposing only its necessary information

questions.question: Explain the concept of classes and objects in OOP. Provide examples.
keyPoints: Classes are blueprints for creating objects

questions.question: Explain the concept of inheritance in OOP. Provide examples.
keyPoints: Inheritance is the process of creating a new class based on an existing class

questions.question: Explain the concept of polymorphism in OOP. Provide examples.
keyPoints: Polymorphism is the ability of an object to take on multiple forms
